_comment: Local-only bio/profile (v1.9). Lives at data/<user>/profile.json (gitignored — NEVER committed). Two jobs: (1) feed accurate contact/identity into the tailored resume header, and (2) hold the common fields job applications ask for, so we can eventually AUTOFILL (but never auto-submit) an application. Fill what's true; leave unknowns as empty strings/null and list them under _confirm. Do not guess identity, work-authorization, or self-ID fields — ask the user. The voluntary_self_id block is sensitive and optional (US EEO forms only); include it only if the user wants to, and never submit it on their behalf.

compensation._note: Sensitive; local-only. Used to sanity-check fit and to answer 'desired comp' fields — never volunteered on a resume.

voluntary_self_id._note: OPTIONAL and sensitive — US EEO / voluntary self-identification only. Leave blank unless the user explicitly wants it captured; never auto-submit.

_confirm: Anything left blank/null above that a target application will ask for.
